blended.narrative: Mount St. Louis Moonstone is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,196 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
